message:
Add type inference for built-ins and string methods

Agent 1 - Built-in function type inference:
- Added type inference for abs(), round(), chr(), ord()
- abs() returns same type as input
- round() returns int, chr() returns string, ord() returns int
- All 4 built-ins were already implemented, just needed type inference

Agent 2 - List memory leaks:
- Verified defer cleanup already implemented correctly
- Generated code has proper defer arraylist.deinit(allocator)
- Zero runtime memory leaks in compiled binaries
- Compiler memory leaks are separate issue (not in generated code)

Agent 3 - String method type inference:
- Added type inference for startswith(), endswith(), find()
- startswith/endswith return bool, find returns int
- Methods were already implemented, just needed type inference

Test results: 44/89 passing (49.4% - unchanged, baseline maintained)
All files under 500 line limit ✅
